mapper.sql: FROM makeup_sign_apply m JOIN attendance_task t ON m.task_id = t.task_id JOIN student s ON m.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN teacher tm ON m.audit_teacher_id = tm.teacher_id
mapper.select:
SELECT m.apply_id, m.task_id, t.task_title, m.record_id, m.student_id, s.student_no, s.student_name, m.apply_reason, m.proof_file_path, m.audit_status, m.audit_teacher_id, tm.teacher_name AS audit_teacher_name, m.audit_comment, m.audit_time, m.create_time
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM makeup_sign_apply WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND audit_status != 0 AND result_viewed = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE makeup_sign_apply SET result_viewed = 1 WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND audit_status != 0 AND result_viewed = 0
